title: Sales Engineer (UPS / Power Management / 5 Days)
description:
• Well Established Power Solutions Company

• Salary range: $2800 - $3500 + Allowance + Commission

• Working hours: 9:00am – 6:00pm (Monday – Friday)

• Working location: Islandwide

• Excellent Welfare & Benefits


Job Scope

  • Acquire and develop sales opportunities through a combination of channels, including but not limited to referrals, networking, cold calls, and face to face meetings, build and maintain a healthy sale pipeline to grow the assigned product lines.
  • Take charge of presales activities, presentations to end users, consultants, main contractors & subcontractors.
  • Expands relationship with existing customers, manage their requirement, propose solution with the assigned product lines, negotiate product pricing and contracts, and close the sale through contract completion.
  • Participate in Tenders involving the assigned product lines, tender preparation and manage the tendering process to ensure it is aligned with the tender requirements.
  • Collaborate with senior management and other sales executives to develop sales solutions with the assigned product lines for revenue growth.
  • Attend to all other sales matters as and when required.

Requirement

  • Diploma in Electrical / Electronic Engineering or relevant
  • 2 – 3 years power related product sales experience
  • Possess Class 3 driving license is an advantage

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


YEOW CHANG FU (R23118759)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
